steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks where tribal economic activity ($143,510 per employee) ranks relative to the three other industries in the table: transportation/warehousing ($234,720), construction ($87,994), and administration/waste ($60,132).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'above all three of the other industries listed in the table.': Tribal activity at $143,510 is less than transportation/warehousing at $234,720, so it is not above all three. ✗
  • Choice B — 'above either administration/waste or construction and nearly equal to transportation/warehousing.': Tribal activity is well below transportation/warehousing ($143,510 vs. $234,720), so ‘nearly equal’ is wrong. ✗
  • Choice C — 'below all three of the other industries listed in the table.': Tribal activity at $143,510 exceeds both construction ($87,994) and administration/waste ($60,132), so it is not below all three. ✗
  • Choice D — 'below transportation/warehousing but above both construction and administration/waste.': $143,510 falls between $234,720 (above) and $87,994 (below), placing it exactly where this choice describes. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
